What we do

Every entertainment need — one partner

From first site survey to grand opening day and beyond, DK handles it all.

★ Prime offering

👑 Private & Palace Entertainment

Bespoke bowling alleys, VR suites, escape rooms and play areas designed for homes, villas and royal residences — fully confidential, white-glove service.

Request a private consultation →

🎳 Bowling equipment

Lanes, pinsetters, ball returns, scoring systems, shoes and pro shop inventory. New builds and retrofits.

🎮 Arcade & VR systems

Free-roam VR arenas, VR pods, redemption games, simulators and ticket management systems.

🔐 Escape room design

Immersive themed rooms, custom props, electronic puzzles, FX systems and GM control software.

🧒 Kids play areas

Soft play structures, climbing frames, ball pits, trampolines and fully themed party suites.

🔧

Installation & fit-out

Factory-trained engineers handle end-to-end installation with minimum downtime and full testing sign-off.

📊

Revenue consulting

Game mix optimisation, pricing strategy and loyalty program design backed by real operator data.

🛡

Maintenance plans

Preventive maintenance schedules, 24/7 emergency call-out and next-day parts delivery.

🏗

Venue design

Concept layouts, theming, lighting design and full project management from planning to opening.

Product catalogue

What we supply

Four complete product lines, stocked and ready to ship across Saudi Arabia.

Bowling

Bowling equipment

Everything from automated pinsetters to LED scoring displays and full lane packages.

  • Automated pinsetters
  • Synthetic & wood lanes
  • Ball return systems
  • Touch-screen scoring & AV
  • Footwear & accessories
Arcade & VR

Arcade & VR systems

From classic redemption cabinets to cutting-edge free-roam VR arenas.

  • Free-roam VR arena systems
  • VR pods & simulators
  • Redemption & ticket games
  • Card management kiosks
  • Arcade video cabinets
Escape rooms

Escape room systems

Turnkey escape room kits from narrative design to GM software.

  • Themed set builds & props
  • Electronic & mechanical puzzles
  • GM control software
  • Special FX & audio systems
  • Multi-room packages
Kids play

Kids play structures

Commercial-grade play equipment certified safe for public entertainment venues.

  • Modular soft play systems
  • Toddler & junior zones
  • Ball pits & trampolines
  • Party room packages
  • Safety flooring & padding

How we work

From first call to opening night

A clear, five-step process with no surprises and no hidden costs.

1

Discovery call

We learn about your venue, goals, footprint and budget — no obligations.

2

Custom proposal

A tailored equipment and service package with transparent, fixed pricing.

3

Installation

Factory-trained engineers install and commission everything with full safety checks.

4

Handover & training

Staff training, full documentation and a dedicated support contact before we leave.

5

Ongoing support

Maintenance contracts, remote monitoring and quarterly business reviews.
